title: Industrial area business robbery, suspects at large
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - George Detectives are investigating a business robbery that took place at a storage facility in the George industrial area on 19 April at about 23:00.

Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies says reports available at this stage indicates that a security official patrolled the premises when he was accosted by two men.


> "They forced him to the ground and threatened the victim with a knife. The suspects took power tools before they fled the scene. The suspects are still at large," said Spies.


Investigating officer WO John Boezak, urges the public to come forward with any information which could assist police to track down the assailants.

Anyone with information may contact the investigation officer at 044 803 4715.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
